title: ReZs super cool Modpack
body:
Welcome to ReZ’s Super Cool Modpack! (Yes, that’s the official name. No, I will not change it.)

This pack is basically my personal collection of mods that I think fit ridiculously well together. If you like suffering, I highly recommend playing in Hard Mode for the ultimate challenge—because why not make your life harder? Also, this pack has almost 300 mods, so if your PC is held together by prayers and duct tape, uh… good luck. I tested this on my Steam Deck and managed a solid 30–45 FPS, so if you’re playing on a literal toaster, you’ve been warned. Oh, and for the Pokémon lovers out there, I threw in a Cobblemon version because of course I did.

Key Features (a.k.a. Why You Should Download This)

• Gorgeous Biomes: Step into jaw-dropping landscapes thanks to (mostly) the Let’s Do Mod series. From lush forests to biomes you probably won’t find twice, there's enough variety to make you stop and go “oh wow, pretty” before a mob punches you in the face.

• Epic Structures: Love adventure? Great. Hate getting lost in massive dungeons? Too bad. Thanks to the YUNG’s Structures series, you’ll find hidden underground horrors, gigantic strongholds, and maybe even regret.

• Enhanced Combat: Combat got a glow-up with Better Combat and MC Dungeons Weapons, Armors, and Artifacts. Now you can fight with new weapons, artifacts, and armor that actually look cool instead of “slightly stronger iron sword.”

• Quality of Life Mods: Because small changes make a big difference. Better clouds? Yes. Biome moss? Absolutely. Actually knowing what you're looking at with Jade? Essential.

• Mobs & Monsters: Beware of chest-shaped nightmares (yes, mimics exist now) and enjoy new flavors of Creepers and Endermen. But don’t worry—it’s not all terrifying. There are also fluffy Wooly Sheep, adorable Moo Blooms, and many new friendly(ish) creatures.

• New Dimensions: Because one world isn’t enough! Explore the Deep Dark via ancient cities, take a trip to space with Eden, or revisit the End and Nether, both of which got a much-needed glow-up.

• Builder’s Paradise: If you love building, you’re in for a treat. I packed in tons of new blocks and decorations so you can go wild. (Or at least make your house look less like a dirt shack.)

• Colorful Magic: Enter Spectrum, the magic mod that’s all about vibrant crystals and progression-based chaos. It’s magic, but make it aesthetic.

(honorable mention to the Essential mod which makes it possible to play together without the need for a realm or a server)

The (Not-So) Fine Print

This modpack will probably never be updated past 1.20.1—there are just too many niche mods that’ll take long (or never) to update. If that’s a dealbreaker, I respect your decision. If you don’t care and love everything I just described, then congratulations, you have great taste. Now go install it and have fun!
